pillar_taxonomy_71_plus._note: 71+ pillars grouped by category. Each pillar scored 0-3. The compact 'scores' section below uses the v1 25-pillar grid for diffing with the prior version. The 'pillar_details' section provides per-pillar details for the highest-leverage 30 pillars (the 30-pillar audit-set is at audit-30-pillar/ in this repo).

pillar_details_top_30.L0_license_present: LICENSE file at repo root with SPDX-compatible identifier
pillar_details_top_30.L1_ci_workflows: GitHub Actions / equivalent CI green for main branch
pillar_details_top_30.L2_source_builds: Repo source builds cleanly on a fresh checkout
pillar_details_top_30.L3_tests_pass: Unit tests pass under default harness
pillar_details_top_30.L5_spec_or_prd: SPEC.md / PRD.md / FUNCTIONAL_REQUIREMENTS.md present and load-bearing
pillar_details_top_30.L8_sota_sqlite_sha256: Uses SQLite (bundled or modernc/CGO-free) + sha256 for baseline/result identity
pillar_details_top_30.L9_sota_harbor_task_fixtures: Has Harbor-compatible task fixtures (task.yaml + tests) for agent-eval
pillar_details_top_30.L10_sota_criterion_regression: Has criterion-style regression baseline + diff tooling
pillar_details_top_30.L12_sota_modernc_sqlite_cgo_free: modernc.org/sqlite (CGO-free SQLite) for portable single-binary deploy
pillar_details_top_30.L16_l7_001_propagation: Active L7-001 request-id propagation through adapter layer
pillar_details_top_30.L17_cargo_bench_harness: [[bench]] section in Cargo.toml pointing at a criterion-style bench
pillar_details_top_30.L20_adaptive_concurrency_model: POSIX flock + atomic SQL claim model
pillar_details_top_30.L22_changelog_present: CHANGELOG.md or release-drafter.yml with last 3 entries
pillar_details_top_30.L28_mise_or_taskfile: mise.toml or Taskfile.yml for polyglot task running

scores_v1_25_pillar_preserved._note: Preserved from the v1 25-pillar scorecard to allow diffing.

tier_scores._note: Same scoring algorithm as v1; total = sum of 25 pillar scores, max = 75, tier per band: A>=60%, B>=50%, C>=40%, D<40%.

headline_artifacts.artifact: benchora CLI (run | report | baseline | compare | list) + SQLite + sha256 baseline promotion
README reconciled (gauge → Benchora, MIT, CLI subcommands)
README reconciled to single-file phenodag.go + remoteclaim layout
4 docs (agents-runtime-status, mcp/INTEGRATION, reference/agileplus-spec-status, operational-standup) + Cargo.lock + Python shim
sparse-checkout disabled; src/tracertm/ now fully visible (adapters, api, cli, database, ml, models, performance, ports, repositories, scoring, self_tracing, services, storage)
README polish — Work-Status callout moved after H1 (was before H1)

lane_summary.active_branch_count_near_total: ~316 across the lane (79 phenotype-registry, 73 PhenoCompose, 69 AgilePlus, 31 BytePort, 18+ Benchora, 16+ portage, …)
sota_wins_in_place: Benchora CLI (run | report | baseline | compare | list) with SQLite + sha256-pinned baselines — competitive with Divan/Criterion/hyperfine for regression management
pheno-harness BurntSushi__ripgrep fixture bundle — 995 Harbor-compatible task fixtures committed on main (7607ffd)
Tracera SOTA-quality manifest — ruff 60+ lint rules, ty (Astral type-checker), tach, radon, vulture, interrogate, pycln, bandit, pip-audit, semgrep, hypothesis — wired and active
phenodag modernc/sqlite (CGO-free) + POSIX flock — portable Go binary with zero CGO surface
portage has a real `src/helios_bench/` Python module — bridge substrate to heliosBench exists
portage has dual `harbor/` + `portage/` source trees — portage is a real fork (not a wrapper) of upstream Harbor
nanovms 3-tier isolation (WASM / gVisor / Firecracker) — unique merge of KooshaPari/nanovms + BytePort/nvms + PhenoCompose driver
external_outcomes: First-of-its-kind SHA256-pinned regression baseline CLI in the Rust criterion ecosystem
995-task ripgrep Harbor fixture bundle — first PR-diff-as-task-eval dataset of its size
Tracera reaches Tier-A by purity of quality-tool wiring (ruff 60+ rules + ty + tach + interrogate + 6 more SOTA tools)
Modernc/sqlite + POSIX-flock Go binary with atomic SQLite claims → makes `pick` race-safe across 5+ agents (verified)
internal_outcomes: All 13 target repos clean and at HEAD; no orphan WIP
3 AgilePlus files stashed in `stash@{0}` ready for downstream PR
phenodag has LICENSE + tightened .gitignore + reconciled README
Benchora has the CLI binary shipped + reconciled README
Tracera local checkout at origin/main HEAD with sparse-checkout disabled — `src/tracertm/` fully visible
next_actions_tier_2: DAG-X1: portage ↔ pheno-harness bridge adapter (load 995 ripgrep fixtures as portage `Task` instances)
DAG-X3: BytePort Tauri × SvelteKit × Cargo × Go convergence Taskfile/mise.toml
DAG-X4: Tracera semantic-embedding scorer (portage ↔ Tracera scoring parity)
DAG-X5: nanovms SOTA-quality manifest parity (mirror Tracera's ruff+ty+tach+bandit+pip-audit)
DAG-X6: registry entry for Benchora CLI + pheno-harness ref-pr-diff data layer
DAG-X7: 30+ pillar audit file (mirror of this scorecard but at the 30-pillar granularity)
DAG-X8: promote Tracera Tier-A `src/tracertm/scoring/` semantics into a `phenotype-trace-core` lib target
out_of_scope: vibeproxy-monitoring-unified is governance scaffolding only — defers to governance lane (Tier D)
Actual `bd` (beads) CLI integration in phenodag — deferred until the upstream protocol stabilizes
portage ↔ harbor upstream merge — only adaptive patches here, no upstream push
